---
title: "Why Redistributing Income Does Not Redistribute Wealth: A Monetary-Design Alternative, Calibrated to Belgium."
author: "Stef Kuypers"
date: today
date-format: "MMM DD, YYYY"
fig-format: png
format:
    html:
        code-fold: true
engine: julia
---

### Test plot

```{julia}
#| label: b1
#| fig-cap: "Core Yard-sale"
#| echo: false

include("belgian_inequality_sim.jl")
plot_b1_baseline(run = false)
```
